court: Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit
snippet: United States v. Samuel Bankman-Fried Good morning, and may it please the Court. My name is Alexandra Shapiro, and I represent Sam Bankman-Fried on this appeal. Mr. Bankman-Fried's trial was fundamentally unfair because the jury only got to hear one side of the story, the prosecution's side, which was demonstrably false. In a series of evidentiary and procedural rulings, the district court deprived Mr. Bankman-Fried of the most basic principle of due process, the ability to rebut the
